name: Xishui Strong Year Co.,Ltd Inner Mongolia
summary: Xishui Strong Year Co.,Ltd Inner Mongolia manufactures and sells cement and clinker. The company also provides network integration and other technical services. In addition, it is involved in the hardware distribution; software development; research and development of network products; and development of energy saving environmental protection equipment and related technologies. The company has operations primarily in the Wuhai, Baotou, Inner Mongolia Autonomous Region, and Shanghai regions of China. Xishui Strong Year Co.,Ltd Inner Mongolia is based in Wuhai, China.
